text:
A person waives the right to a hearing under this subchapter and the department’s suspension or denial is final and may not be appealed if the person:

(1) fails to request a hearing under Section 724.041 (Hearing on Suspension or Denial) ; or

(2) requests a hearing and fails to appear, without good cause.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 724. Implied Consent
##### § 724.044 — Waiver of Right to Hearing

A person waives the right to a hearing under this subchapter and the department’s suspension or denial is final and may not be appealed if the person:

    (1) fails to request a hearing under Section 724.041 (Hearing on Suspension or Denial) ; or

    (2) requests a hearing and fails to appear, without good cause.

*Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.*

subsections.text: A person waives the right to a hearing under this subchapter and the department’s suspension or denial is final and may not be appealed if the person:
fails to request a hearing under Section 724.041 (Hearing on Suspension or Denial) ; or
requests a hearing and fails to appear, without good cause.
